name: Kalman Filter Skeleton
summary: Propagate the hidden state and covariance forward, compare the predicted hidden state against the observation, compute the Kalman gain, then update the posterior state and covariance.
dejargonized_summary: Project the hidden state estimate forward, compare it with the new measurement, decide how much to trust that measurement, and update both the estimate and its uncertainty together.

stages.name: Predict State
stages.description: Propagate the latent state estimate through the transition model before processing the next observation.
stages.dejargonized_description: Project the current state guess one step forward before looking at the next measurement.

stages.name: Predict Covariance
stages.description: Propagate the state uncertainty through the same transition so the update step retains an explicit uncertainty channel.
stages.dejargonized_description: Carry the uncertainty forward along with the state prediction instead of dropping it.

stages.name: Innovation
stages.description: Compare the predicted state against the observation to compute the measurement residual.
stages.dejargonized_description: Measure how different the new observation is from what the prediction expected.

stages.name: Kalman Gain
stages.description: Compute how strongly the observation should influence the update given the predicted uncertainty and observation noise.
stages.dejargonized_description: Decide how much to trust the new measurement versus the model prediction.

stages.name: Update State
stages.description: Update the posterior state estimate using the predicted state, Kalman gain, and innovation.
stages.dejargonized_description: Adjust the state guess using how surprising the new measurement was.

stages.name: Update Covariance
stages.description: Update the posterior covariance so the next step retains the revised uncertainty state.
stages.dejargonized_description: Update the uncertainty to reflect what the new measurement taught the filter.

planning_constraints.subject: kalman_filter
planning_constraints.statement: Preserve the explicit covariance channel through the predict and update stages.
planning_constraints.rationale: Kalman-family updates depend on state and uncertainty evolving together.

audit.rationale: Publishes a concrete Kalman-family macro scaffold while artifact ownership migrates into the provider repos.
audit.dejargonized_summary: A concrete state-estimation scaffold that keeps state prediction, uncertainty prediction, measurement comparison, and posterior update separate.

migration_readiness.rationale: The topology is stable, but the canonical artifact still lives in the matcher compatibility layer.

references.title: Optimal State Estimation
references.citation: Dan Simon. Kalman, H Infinity, and Nonlinear Approaches.

uncertainty_notes: This scaffold does not encode variant-specific nonlinear update details for EKF or UKF.
